title: • Today's Intention: I will express love or appreciation to someone imp
content:
• Today's Intention: I will express love or appreciation to someone important to me, recognizing the preciousness of our time together.
    • NIGHT
    • Night Reading: "From that hour on, the river ceased to be for Siddhartha only a river with a ferry; it became a symbol of life, a symbol of the path, a symbol of suffering, a symbol of release."
    • Reflection: What is the nature of my love for others? Is it grasping or freeing? What did I learn about love today?
    Day 23
    MORNING
    • Morning Reading: "The boy was spoilt, he was accustomed to a life of luxury, to fine food, to a soft bed... He could not love his father, he was afraid of him, he felt himself a prisoner in this poor hut."
    • Today's Intention: I will try to love someone today by understanding what they need, not what I think they need.
    NIGHT
    • Night Reading: "Siddhartha understood that his love for the boy, his blind love, was a passion, something very human, that it was Sansara, a murky source, a dark water."
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 23 (chunk 23/29)
